title: Plettenberg Bay gardens bloom for Paws… and  a good cause
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Five of Plett's...
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"The featured gardens included the Erasmus garden in Whale Rock Ridge, the Blackbeard garden in Whale Rock Heights and three gardens in Brackenridge Estate - the Hawkes, Jones and Sounes gardens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The annual event raises much-needed funds for the Plett Animal Welfare Society (Paws) and is more than a garden show - it highlights all aspects of investing into a blooming industry - time, labour, plants … and love.","html":"The annual event raises much-needed funds for the Plett Animal Welfare Society (Paws) and is more than a garden show - it highlights all aspects of investing into a blooming industry - time, labour, plants … and love."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marsja Hall-Green, the organiser, and Paws chairperson Di Butlin, were on hand to encourage participation at Ouland Royale restaurant which hosted the popular Paws cake and plant sale and was open all day for coffee, scones and light snacks.","html":"Marsja Hall-Green, the organiser, and Paws chairperson Di Butlin, were on hand to encourage participation at Ouland Royale restaurant which hosted the popular Paws cake and plant sale and was open all day for coffee, scones and light snacks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hall-Green said the garden day attempted to include a variety of gardens - some indigenous, some mixed, but all really spectacular.","html":"Hall-Green said the garden day attempted to include a variety of gardens - some indigenous, some mixed, but all really spectacular."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While not considered an industry, gardening does benefit other industries such as design, landscaping, nurseries, maintenance and management, and requires capital investment in its own right. \"Not to mention the enjoyment it gives home-owners - and the employment opportunities gardening creates,\" she said.","html":"While not considered an industry, gardening does benefit other industries such as design, landscaping, nurseries, maintenance and management, and requires capital investment in its own right. \"Not to mention the enjoyment it gives home-owners - and the employment opportunities gardening creates,\" she said."},{"type":"heading","text":"Double gold award","level":"h3"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hall-Green said the day was a great success with many visitors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Plettenberg Bay gardens bloom for Paws… and  a good cause
